utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: By the way , the week before your wedding you may not see a lot of me .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Look , I ... I am really sorry I let go of the bike .

emotion_cause.span: 3_I ... I am really sorry I let go of the bike .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I could have been killed I hope you know !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I know . I know . But , can we please try it again ? Huh ? I mean , you were so close Phoebe !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Well , I would love to but ... the bike got stolen and the police have no suspects .

emotion_cause.span: 6_the bike got stolen and the police have no suspects .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: If you are not going to learn how to ride this bike then I am sorry , I am just gonna have to take it back .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Because ! Because , it ... it ... it is ... It would be like you having this guitar and ... and never playing it . Okay , this guitar wants to be played !
